prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your smart garden forward
items: Survey and document your outdoor space dimensions, sunlight patterns, and existing infrastructure
Research and compare 3-5 smart garden systems within your budget range
Test your soil quality and pH levels in planned growing areas
Create a detailed inventory of your current gardening tools, supplies, and plant preferences
Install and configure a basic plant identification app to learn about plants in your area
Research and document your local growing season calendar and frost dates
